---
title: "Fuel Economy"
author: "Aiden Ross"
date: "2026-02-18"
date-modified: last-modified
draft: true
format: html
---

What makes a car efficient fuel wise? This is a complicated question. Lets answer another question: How can you make the most out of your cars efficiency. Well, maybe, I am going to collect data with my two vehicle and diccuss my findings and data.

## Methodology

1.  Initial Measurements

-   The initial measurements will come from a few simple sources
    1.  The distance meter and a the refueling volume
    2.  The built in vehicle measurements
    3.  Phyphox for acceleration and location data

2.  Future Measurements

-   In the future I would like to play around with a PI OBD2 adapter set up to collect data

## Limitations

Especially with the initial measurements I am limited and unable to provide precise measures. The first experiments will be limited to the average fuel consumption per mile.
